# @auth

Restricts a field or type to callers holding at least the given role.

Locations: `FIELD_DEFINITION`, `OBJECT`.

## Arguments

- **`requires`**: [`Role!`](../types/enums/Role.md) = `CUSTOMER`

<!-- graphql-okf:generated:end -->
